thread_model: synchronous repo mutex / recursive filesystem IO; no async spawn, no callback thread, no process handoff
side_effect: mutating FS: join skill-backups/id, read metadata.json, backup existing installed target as rollbackBackup, remove target, copy backup tree, load restored summary
error_surface: Tauri/CoreEnvelope ok/error. Error branches include missing repo/state, poisoned lock, invalid/missing SKILL.md, not-found id, metadata read/parse failure, create/copy/remove IO failure, canonicalize failure where applicable.
acceptance_mapping: manual/unit: restore existing backup returns restoredSkill and optional rollbackBackup; missing/corrupt metadata errors; copy failure reports error
